headline: Lennar Corp-A (NYSE:LEN) Screens as a Strong Dividend Stock with Stability and Growth
summary: Lennar Corp offers a strong dividend profile with a 2.23% yield, 26.65% annual growth, and excellent financial health. This balanced approach helps identify sustainable dividend payers for long-term income investors.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Lennar, Lowers Price Target to $94
summary: UBS  analyst John Lovallo   maintains Lennar (NYSE:LEN) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $107 to $94.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Lennar, Lowers Price Target to $77

headline: Lennar (LEN) Stock After Housing Sector Headwinds And Mixed Long Term Returns
summary: If you are wondering whether Lennar's current share price still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this breakdown is designed to give you a clear view. The stock most recently closed at US$89.75, with returns that include a 1.1% decline over the last 7 days, a 9.1% gain over the last 30 days, and falls of 13.9% year to date and 16.5% over the last year, while the 5 year return sits at 7.4%. Recent trading has been shaped by ongoing housing sector headlines,...
